headline: This REIT Yielding 16% Just Landed a New $5 Million Bet From EMG Holdings
summary: This mortgage REIT invests in agency and non-agency MBS, offering a double-digit dividend yield and exposure to U.S. housing markets.

headline: KB Home Stock Is Down 15%. So Why Did One Investor Buy Up $4 Million in Shares Last Quarter?
summary: KB Home develops single-family homes and townhomes for a range of buyers across major U.S. markets, with integrated financial services.
